ham.subject: Your Order #123456 has been Confirmed - Amazon
ham.body:
Hello John Doe,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order #123456 placed on 15 Oct 2025 has been confirmed. Items:
- Wireless Mouse (1 unit)
- Keyboard (1 unit)
Estimated delivery: 20 Oct 2025.

Aapka order confirm ho gaya. Aapko koi bhi question ho toh reply karein.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best Regards,
Amazon Support Team

spam.subject: Important: Income Tax Department - Refund Pending
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

This is to inform you that your income tax refund of INR 50000 is pending. To claim, click <URL> and provide your PAN and bank details. Kripya jaldi se action lein. Failure to comply will result in deduction.

Regards,
Income Tax Department
